name: Where Food Comes From, Inc.
summary: Where Food Comes From, Inc. (WFCF) is a leading third-party verification provider for food production practices in North America, supporting approximately 17,500 farmers, ranchers, processors, retailers, and restaurants. The company conducts on-site and desk audits to verify claims such as gluten-free, non-GMO, non-hormone treated, and humane handling across beef, lamb, pork, poultry, fish, dairy, eggs, produce, nuts, grains, and wine. It also offers professional consulting services and a Source Verified retail labeling program connecting consumers to food sources.

products.name: Third-Party Verification Audits
products.description: On-site and desk audits verifying food production claims such as non-GMO, gluten-free, non-hormone treated, and humane handling for livestock, aquaculture, crops, and other food products.

products.name: Where Food Comes From Source Verified Labeling Program
products.description: Retail and restaurant labeling program using product attribute verification to connect consumers to food sources via product labels and web-based information sharing.

products.name: Professional Consulting Services
products.description: Consulting services specific to the food and agricultural industry generating incremental revenue and driving sustainable value creation.

products.name: Technology Solutions
products.description: Technology solutions for data capture, process improvement, and communicating customer values and practices to consumers in the food and agricultural industry.

partnerships.description: WFCF serves as a third-party auditor for Tyson's Climate-Smart Beef Program, collecting and verifying farm management and operational data to track beef emissions at the individual animal level.
